action_set_definitions.name: list_devices_in_sector
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the unique IDs of all hardware devices located within a specified geographical or logical sector.

sector_name.description: The name of the sector to query (e.g., 'North Sector').

action_set_definitions.name: get_scene_configuration
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the target physical power states and attribute settings for a specific named scene.

scene_name.description: The name of the configuration scene (e.g., 'Night_Defense').

action_set_definitions.name: get_device_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the real-time physical status of a device, including power state, online status, and Link Quality Indicator (LQI).

device_id.description: The unique ID of the device to query.

action_set_definitions.name: get_hub_shadow_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the state currently recorded in the hub's shadow registry for a specific device.

device_id.description: The unique ID of the device.

action_set_definitions.name: remediate_link
action_set_definitions.description: Attempts to improve a device's signal strength (LQI) or re-establish a lost connection through standard mesh optimization.

device_id.description: The unique ID of the device requiring remediation.

action_set_definitions.name: update_device_power
action_set_definitions.description: Sends a command to change the physical power state of a device.

device_id.description: The unique ID of the device.

action_set_definitions.name: sync_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Synchronizes the hub's shadow registry entry for a device to match its actual physical power status.

device_id.description: The unique ID of the device.

action_set_definitions.name: search_alternative_infrastructure
action_set_definitions.description: Scans other sectors to identify active repeaters or hub nodes that could provide alternative high-integrity routes for the current sector's devices.

current_sector.description: The sector currently experiencing link issues.

action_set_definitions.name: set_device_route
action_set_definitions.description: Forcibly assigns a specific parent node (repeater or hub) to a device to improve communication integrity.

device_id.description: The ID of the device to be routed.

target_parent_id.description: The ID of the infrastructure node to serve as the new parent.

state_description.devices: A dictionary mapping unique device IDs to their current attributes (status, power, mode, etc.).
state_description.scenes: A dictionary of predefined configurations mapping scene names to specific device states.
state_description.connectivity_status: The current network status of the home hub (e.g., 'online', 'offline', 'pairing').
state_description.last_action_timestamp: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful state change.
